'''''Trips''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that [[Mission to retrieve a grain supply|reclaimed]] ''[[D3RM3]]'', the cargo of the stranded [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Op Mus]]'' containing [[Grain/Legends|grain]] vital to the Alliance due to the food shortage following the [[evacuation of Yavin]].<ref name="XWCOSG">''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}
